feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,248Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 5

Summary: By the time Merlin stepped out of the elevator and into the lobby of Smith, Pendragon & Pendragon, he was already regretting every decision that had led him there. Merlin probably should have left the building immediately. Instead, he tightened his grip on the briefcase and headed toward the elevators. Because somewhere between Gaius getting sick and Will making that deal, common sense had apparently abandoned him entirely.

entry.title: Five hundred years
entry.summary:
Author: Vic467

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 586Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: "It had been five hundred years by now. Arthur had died five centuries earlier, on that day. Merlin had continued to live for all that time, never aging, waiting for the great return foretold by the dragon. He was still waiting" Or Merlin goes to the college, until one day he meets Arthur

entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,072Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 15

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: the ways of the old, old winds blowin' back round
entry.summary:
Author: habituallywastingtime

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,526Chapters: 4/16Kudos: 59

Summary: As a child, Arthur didn’t know why he was kept away from the courtyard. Or why it so often smelt… like that. Until one morning, Sir Kay guided him to the balcony he’d only been allowed on sometimes. Only sometimes, because it looks over the courtyard. His father was waiting for him, holding an arm out to beckon him closer. Arthur rushed in, latching himself onto his father’s side as it was so rarely permitted. There was a crowd below him; he had never seen so many people in one place. There was a pile of wood. He remembers little outside of the way his eyes burned, how he at last understood that smell. He remembers forcing down his supper that night and emptying his stomach in the corridor before he could even reach his room. Now he remembers it all. He can’t feel the bruising stones under his knees, hardly tastes the leftover bile coating his mouth. All he knows is the all-consuming realization that his greatest fear and anguish still holds the throne, even in his heart.  sequel to the pale morning sings of forgotten things

entry.title: The Dawn of Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: WhisperedPages819

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,424Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Maryana returns to Camelot alive—but survival has a cost. Her escape from captivity leaves the court shaken, the king fearful, and the city bristling with suspicion. Old alliances strain under the weight of secrets, and the laws against magic tighten even as something ancient stirs beyond the castle walls. Hidden within Camelot is a boy the world was never meant to find. His presence bends fate in subtle, dangerous ways—drawing attention from forces that do not yet understand what they have awakened. As Arthur is pulled between loyalty and justice, and Morgana begins to walk a darker, more deliberate path, Maryana is forced to confront a truth she has spent years avoiding: destiny cannot be outrun—only challenged. Because when the old world begins to fracture, the dawn does not arrive gently.And some futures demand to be fought for.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,863Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 125

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,763Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,331Chapters: 2/13Kudos: 2

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,263Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 115

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

entry.title: The Dragonlord's Predicament
entry.summary:
Author: JustGettingBy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,609Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 785

Summary: Merlin's new Dragonlord powers come with some unforeseen side effects. When he's kidnapped by bandits, the new aspect of his powers makes itself known. But Merlin could've gotten himself out of the mess on his own, thank you very much, if only Arthur hadn't made it worse by rushing in and trying to save him.

entry.title: The Lake at the End of the World
entry.summary:
Author: LonelyWhovian

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,356Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 6

Summary: He is the Once and Future King. Take heart, for when Albion's need is greatest: Arthur will return. It is these words that keep Merlin at the shores of Avalon. Even centuries after the lake dried up, millennia after its true name was lost, Merlin stays, waiting for his King to return. *** Glastonbury Tor calls out in the dark, and some seek to answer.In between fighting for his life and trying to uncover what might cause the end of the world, Jon Sims stumbles across a mysterious selection of statements that point not only toward Glastonbury, but to the very heart of Arthurian Myth itself. *** Linked through nightmares and each grappling with the changes in the world around them, Merlin and Jon, with the help of their team, must uncover when Albion's need will be greatest, and what they can do to stop it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Martin Blackwood/Jonathan "Jon" Sims | The Archivist

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,485Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,161Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,933Chapters: 65/67Kudos: 268

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: don't panic
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,794Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The Great Plan. Destiny. Fate. Call it what you will, there are certain people it's taken a shine to over the years. Amongst those people, this is generally seen as a Very Bad Thing. Arthur's returned, and while Merlin's delighted about that, he does know what it means. He's been hoping it wasn't going to be for a good long time, though. Things have been... nice. They've been settling in - have community now, even. Friends. A bunch of mad vigilante types who remind him, just a little, of the knights. Merlin hasn't felt this part of something in, well, it's been a while. Then he has to go and run into an old friend summoned and then trapped in a circle by bloody amateurs trying to conjure up something to help them with their Daredevil problem. Now it seems the world's ending. Again, apparently. (You don’t need to know all the fandoms, any context needed is given in the notes or is obvious in the story. Feel free to ask questions in the comments if there's anything you don't get!)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Insanity
entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,003Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 7

Summary: Merlin is a patient in a mental health hospital and Arthur is her doctor. Merlin has feelings for Arthur and Arthur has feelings for Merlin, but the two of them shouldn't be together, with their doctor patient relationship as well as their age gap but after fixing some misunderstandings, is there a way for them to be together? Old work originally posted on FF.net in 2013.
